pageContext.name: Queen of Hearts
pageContext.description: Super7's latest wave of Disney ULTIMATES! presented by Sideshow has a little something for everyone! With Ben AliGator from Disney's Fantasia, Stitch from Disney's Lilo & Stitch, Disney Silly Symphony's The Big Bad Wolf, and The Queen of Hearts from Disney's Alice in Wonderland, there's an ULTIMATES! figure for fans of vintage shorts, animated classics, and beloved modern movies! These 7' scale highly-articulated, made-to-order figures come with interchangeable parts and additional must-have accessories, making them the ultimate collectible for any Disney fan!  We hope you planted the red roses instead of the white ones because The Queen of Hearts is here and such mistakes can have dire consequences! This 7 scale, highly articulated, intricately designed ULTIMATES! figure of The Queen of Hearts from Disney's Alice in Wonderland is accompanied by the King of Hearts and includes multiple interchangeable heads& hands as well as a variety of accessories. Don't lose your head! Be sure to order your made-to-order Disney ULTIMATES! Queen of Hearts figure and turn your collection into a Wonderland!
